name: Golf Society
address: 1609 W Pierce St Suite C, Carlsbad, NM 88220
about: Golf Society New Mexico is an indoor multi-sport simulator facility and golf service center in Carlsbad. It offers four professional-quality golf simulators with high-tech graphics and fluid ball movement, allowing players to experience world-class courses without traveling. The venue provides comprehensive golf services, including club fitting and repair, alongside a variety of other sports simulations such as baseball, soccer, dodgeball, and shooting. Operating hours are Monday, Wednesday-Thursday 1pm-10pm, Friday-Saturday 1am, and Sunday 1pm-10pm, with Tuesday closed.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to four professional-quality golf simulators with high-tech graphics
Comprehensive golf services including club fitting and repair
Variety of available world-class courses to simulate
Extended weekend hours for late-night play

food_and_drink.notes: No bar or alcohol service mentioned

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, the facility offers golf club rentals and professional fitting services to ensure equipment that suits your needs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed, as there is no information about an on-site kitchen or bar.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required for a full 18 holes, but simulator rentals are priced per hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers various sports and games suitable for children, including zombie games and carnival games.
